title: Buttery Japanese Rice Bowl
description: A simple and flavorful Japanese-inspired dish featuring buttery Japanese rice and a side of curry.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add buttery and let it melt.
Add Japanese Rice to the pan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add curry to the pan and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
If using egg, stir-fry for another minute.
Serve the Japanese Rice and curry hot.
Garnish with green onions or sesame seeds if desired.
